# Tony Kipkemboi

> AI Engineer and Content Creator specializing in AI automations, agent systems, and developer education. US Army veteran. Former CrewAI, Snowflake, Bloomberg, Booz Allen Hamilton.

I build AI automations and agent systems that help teams work smarter. I create technical content about AI across social platforms including YouTube, where my most popular video on building PDF RAG systems with Ollama has 189K+ views.

I've spoken at PyCon US, ODSC, Harvard Kennedy School, IBM TechXchange, MLOps World, and more. I'm passionate about open-source software, AI agents, and developer education.

## Contact

- Website: https://tonykipkemboi.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/tonykipkemboi
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@tonykipkemboi
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/tonykipkemboi
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/tonykipkemboi

## Blog

- [All Posts](https://tonykipkemboi.com/blog): Technical articles on AI agents, security, and tutorials

### Recent Posts

- [Securing the AI Frontier](https://tonykipkemboi.com/blog/ai-agent-security): Security considerations for AI agent systems
- [Agent Authentication & RBAC](https://tonykipkemboi.com/blog/agent-authentication-rbac): Implementing authentication and role-based access control for agents
- [SaaS vs Agents](https://tonykipkemboi.com/blog/saas-vs-agents): Comparing traditional SaaS with AI agent architectures

## Open Source Projects

### Ollama PDF RAG (484 stars)
A locally-hosted RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system that allows users to chat with their PDF documents using Ollama and LangChain. Features include document chunking, vector embeddings, and semantic search.
- GitHub: https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/ollama_pdf_rag
- Tech: Python, Ollama, LangChain, Streamlit, ChromaDB

### CrewAI Gmail Automation (175 stars)
Automate Gmail inbox management using CrewAI agents. Intelligently categorizes, responds to, and organizes emails using AI-powered workflows.
- GitHub: https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/crewai-gmail-automation
- Tech: Python, CrewAI, Gmail API, LangChain

### Resume Optimization Crew (145 stars)
AI-powered resume optimization system using CrewAI. Analyzes and enhances resumes to match job descriptions and ATS requirements.
- GitHub: https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/resume-optimization-crew
- Tech: Python, CrewAI, AI Optimization

### Trip Planner Agent (137 stars)
CrewAI agents that can plan your vacation. Uses multi-agent collaboration to create detailed itineraries based on your preferences.
- GitHub: https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/trip_planner_agent
- Tech: Python, CrewAI, Streamlit, LangChain

### Streamlit Replicate Image App (99 stars)
Image generation application built with Streamlit and Replicate API. Generate AI images using various models through an intuitive interface.
- GitHub: https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/streamlit-replicate-img-app
- Tech: Python, Streamlit, Replicate, Image Generation

### Groq Streamlit Demo (85 stars)
Demo showcasing Groq's ultra-fast LLM inference with Streamlit. Experience lightning-fast AI responses in an interactive web interface.
- GitHub: https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/groq_streamlit_demo
- Tech: Python, Groq, Streamlit, LLM

### Ollama Streamlit Demos (82 stars)
Collection of Streamlit demos showcasing various Ollama local LLM capabilities. Run AI models locally with no API keys required.
- GitHub: https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/ollama_streamlit_demos
- Tech: Python, Ollama, Streamlit, Local LLM

### CrewAI Streamlit Demo (66 stars)
Demo showcasing how to output CrewAI agent task outputs on the Streamlit UI.
- GitHub: https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/crewai-streamlit-demo
- Tech: Python, CrewAI, Streamlit

### Research Paper to Podcast (65 stars)
Automated system that transforms academic research papers into engaging podcast conversations using CrewAI and ElevenLabs.
- GitHub: https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/research-paper-to-podcast
- Tech: Python, CrewAI, ElevenLabs

### YouTube Yapper Trapper (64 stars)
Extract and analyze YouTube video transcripts. Perfect for researchers, content creators, and anyone who wants to quickly digest video content.
- GitHub: https://github.com/tonykipkemboi/youtube_yapper_trapper
- Tech: Python, YouTube API, Transcription

### Kaa Rada
A modern Pomodoro web app to secure your focus and execute your tasks. Features a timer, music player (add YouTube tracks), task list, and live Hacker News feed.
- Link: https://v0-kaa-rada-qohixj.vercel.app/
- Tech: Next.js, Vercel v0, Pomodoro, YouTube, Hacker News

### YouTube Thumbnail Extractor
Extract high-quality thumbnails from any YouTube video. Simply paste the URL to get started.
- Link: https://www.downloadthumbnails.com/
- Tech: Next.js, YouTube, Web App

## Speaking & Media Appearances

### Talks

- [MLOps World Conference - Austin](https://mlopsworld.com/speakers/) (October 2025): Speaker demonstrating how agent orchestration, paired with rigorous evaluation, accelerates the path from prototype to production.
- [IBM TechXchange Conference](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/tonykipkemboi_ibmtechxchange-activity-7381001218820681728-Njde/) (October 2025): Speaker discussing AI agents and enterprise AI adoption strategies.
- [Convergence 2025 - GenAI Engineering Conference](https://www.comet.com/site/about-us/news-and-events/events/convergence-2025/) (May 2025): Speaking at Comet's virtual conference on GenAI Engineering, covering AI agent orchestration and multi-agent systems.
- [ODSC East 2025 Workshop](https://odsc.com/boston/) (May 2025): Led a highly attended workshop on 'Agentic AI in Action: Build Autonomous, Multi-Agent Systems Hands-On in Python'.
- [Guest Lecture at Harvard Kennedy School](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/tonykipkemboi_aiagents-hks-activity-7301069792810008576-H7os/) (February 2025): Guest speaker on AI agents for Prof. Hu's data and information visualization class.
- [PyCon US 2024](https://us.pycon.org/2024/speaker/profile/90/index.html) (May 2024): Selected speaker at PyCon US 2024, the largest annual gathering for the Python programming community.

### Courses & Tutorials

- [Building AI Agents with CrewAI - DataCamp Course](https://www.datacamp.com/courses/building-ai-agents-with-crewai) (October 2025): Comprehensive course teaching developers how to build AI agent systems with CrewAI.
- [Creating a Podcast Generation AI Multi-Agent - DataCamp Code-Along](https://www.datacamp.com/code-along/creating-a-podcast-generation-ai-multi-agent-with-crew-ai) (August 2025): Interactive code-along tutorial teaching how to use CrewAI to build a multi-agent system.

### Podcasts

- [ODSC AI X Podcast - AI Agents](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/odsc-east-2025-minisodes/id1721516836?i=1000712490491) (June 2025): Featured on ODSC's AI X Podcast discussing foundational AI agent building skills and practical implementation strategies.

### Articles

- [Build agentic systems with CrewAI and Amazon Bedrock](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/build-agentic-systems-with-crewai-and-amazon-bedrock/) (March 2025): Co-authored AWS ML Blog post on building agentic systems with CrewAI and Amazon Bedrock.
- [C.I.S. Strong: Meet Tony Kipkemboi](https://blog.cis.upenn.edu/c-i-s-strong-meet-tony-kipkemboi/) (August 2020): Featured in Penn Engineering's CIS Strong series.

## Expertise

- AI Agents & Multi-Agent Systems
- CrewAI, LangChain, LlamaIndex
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
- Python, Streamlit
- Local LLMs (Ollama, Groq)
- Developer Education & Technical Content

## Background

- US Army Veteran
- Former Developer Advocate at CrewAI
- Former Snowflake
- Former Bloomberg
